title: User Context Data Model
description: An interactive vis-network graph of the user-context data model, with a central User connected to profile, preferences, history, sessions, queries, settings, and behavioral patterns.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.topic: User context data modeling for personalization
learningObjectives: Describe the entities and relationships in a user-context data model
Distinguish direct attributes from derived (learned) attributes
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of graph data models and entities/relationships

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Interactive node-link graph with hover properties, click-to-highlight, and type filters
pedagogical.assessment: Students trace a path from User to a query and extend the model with a new node type
